note: Provenance ledger for every shipped flagship audio asset. The build-time validator (tools/audio/validate-flagship.mjs) rejects a release if any committed asset under public/audio/flagship/ lacks an entry here with an ALLOWED license (CC0 / CC-BY / pixabay / royalty-free). CC-BY entries carry an `attribution` line that also appears in docs/audio/CREDITS.md and (before shipping) the in-game credits screen.
